\tzpentry{ID5497}{Encode Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5497 introduces Encode Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} T_{\mathrm{encode}} = \mathcal{O}(n\log n),\qquad T_{\mathrm{decode}}=\mathcal{O}(\log 153{,}600). \end{align}
